Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-20 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker Dashboard Today's data reveals two exceptional performers at the top of the 700+ ticker ranking, with TNGX dominating at rank 1 with a composite score of 98.4. TNGX shows extraordinary long-term momentum (1041% return over 1 year) paired with consistent ratio progression across all timeframes and perfect SMA alignment across the 30/50/100/200-day moving averages. The second-ranked TYRA demonstrates more moderate but still substantial gains (247% 1-year return) with cleaner intermediate-term ratios and similar technical positioning. Both tickers outperform broad market benchmarks (SPY and QQQ) significantly across multiple timeframes, though TNGX's vs_spy_1y outperformance of 1025.9% is an extreme outlier that warrants scrutiny regarding survivorship bias or sector concentration. The relatively low correlations of both tickers to major sector ETFs (negative correlations to XLP, XLB, XLI) suggest these are niche or speculative names rather than broad market plays.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
